form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of nine months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation when last of 13 at Bairnsdale Mdn-Sw July 21 over 1200m, soft track; 21 len behind Mickidamuzz carrying 59.5kg at $51. First up last campaign seventh of 10 at Sapphire Coast Ctry Mdn February 2 2025 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Southern Deel with 55.5kg at $3.50. Can make a bright start for the new stable.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Gelding back from a spell of nine months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation when last of 13 at Bairnsdale Mdn-Sw July 21 over 1200m, soft track; 21 len behind Mickidamuzz carrying 59.5kg at $51. First up last campaign seventh of 10 at Sapphire Coast Ctry Mdn February 2 2025 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Southern Deel with 55.5kg at $3.50. Can make a bright start for the new stable.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 400m commenced to give ground.
Passing the 1000m, taken out slightly by Corio Willow.
Began awkwardly and bumped Stormy Woo.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after nine months 2nd of 7 at Broken Hill Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 900m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Hedged Your Bets carrying 55kg at $6. Previously second-up 9th of 12 at this track 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on July 6 over 1100m, 10 len behind Tanna with 54kg at $31. Won't be far away with a repeat of that latest performance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). Second-up. First-up after nine months 2nd of 7 at Broken Hill Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 900m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Hedged Your Bets carrying 55kg at $6. Previously second-up 9th of 12 at this track 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on July 6 over 1100m, 10 len behind Tanna with 54kg at $31. Won't be far away with a repeat of that latest performance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: A pre-race veterinary examination, revealed no abnormalities.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign when last of 8 at Moree Ctry Mdn July 22 over 1300m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Cammi carrying 56kg at $9. Previously first up; sixth of 9 at Coonamble 2&3yo Hcp June 15 over 1200m, 7 len behind Sneaky Sofia carrying 53kg at $10. In the mix on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Resumes. Finished off last campaign when last of 8 at Moree Ctry Mdn July 22 over 1300m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Cammi carrying 56kg at $9. Previously first up; sixth of 9 at Coonamble 2&3yo Hcp June 15 over 1200m, 7 len behind Sneaky Sofia carrying 53kg at $10. In the mix on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, shifted out and bumped with Poems.

form.formComment: At the latest run held ground to the line 2nd of 10 at Port Lincoln 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1000m, 4 len behind Golden Tunes with 56kg at $12. The race before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 10 at Port Lincoln 2yo+ Mdn Hcp on March 15 over 1210m, 2 len behind Minato with 54.5kg at $4.60. Working up to a win. Everything points towards a big run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). At the latest run held ground to the line 2nd of 10 at Port Lincoln 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1000m, 4 len behind Golden Tunes with 56kg at $12. The race before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 10 at Port Lincoln 2yo+ Mdn Hcp on March 15 over 1210m, 2 len behind Minato with 54.5kg at $4.60. Working up to a win. Everything points towards a big run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Reared on jumping away, shifted in and bumped Nadege.

form.formComment: Last start second last of 12 at Balaklava 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Leliyn with 56kg at $91. The start before that ran on strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 10 at Port Lincoln 2yo+ Mdn Hcp on March 15 over 1210m, 0.7 len behind Minato with 54kg at $14. Maiden status should remain intact.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5). Last start second last of 12 at Balaklava 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Leliyn with 56kg at $91. The start before that ran on strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 10 at Port Lincoln 2yo+ Mdn Hcp on March 15 over 1210m, 0.7 len behind Minato with 54kg at $14. Maiden status should remain intact.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide without cover throughout the event. Raced keenly near the 900m.

form.formComment: Was well in the market at debut, ran last of 7 at Broken Hill Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 900m, slow going 15 len behind Hedged Your Bets with 56.5kg at $4.20. Perfectly drawn but still prepared to risk.
